meta.title: Magnetic Creator — Saga for Creators Vol. 3 | Isabella Lizarralde
meta.description: The complete system to turn your content into real income: 8 monetization models, fair pricing, fearless negotiation, and a profile that attracts brands. Because visibility without conversion is just exposure.

hero.headline: You already defined who you are. You already built how you show up. Now all of that turns into real money.
hero.subhead: The complete system to go from visibility to income: 8 monetization models, real pricing for LATAM and the USA, fearless negotiation, and a profile that works for you before you say a word.
hero.decorativeAlt: Warm editorial aesthetic: cherry, vanilla, and columbia blue
hero.ctaMicrocopy: Instant access · Secure payment · No subscription

problem.title: You have content, you have an audience, you have ideas. The money still hasn’t arrived. And that’s not random.

cards.title: You post well but nobody reaches out to hire you
cards.body: Your content attracts, but it has no path. There’s an invisible stage between “I like this” and “I’ll hire you”—and without a conversion system, people arrive, look, and leave without taking the next step.

cards.title: You don’t know what to charge without underselling yourself
cards.body: Price doubt makes you give in before they even ask. And every time you charge less than your work is worth, the discount comes out of your time—not the brand’s budget.

cards.title: You wait for brands to come on their own
cards.body: Without inbound or outbound strategy, the only variable you control is waiting. And waiting doesn’t pay the bills. Creators with fewer followers than you are already earning because they took the step to go find opportunities.

cards.title: You’re watching the wrong numbers
cards.body: You count views and followers. But the metrics that actually predict income—retention, saves, real conversations—you’re not even measuring. And without that information, every week you post without knowing what to improve.

solution.title: By the end of this ebook, you’ll know exactly how to turn your content into real income.

titleHighlight.before: By the end of this ebook, you’ll know exactly how to

solution.giftHint: Includes metrics tracker, brand negotiation script, and safe-zone template.

outcomes.title: Build your complete conversion system
outcomes.body: The 3 stages that take someone from seeing you for the first time to paying you—with the exact role of Instagram, TikTok, and WhatsApp in that path. Because content brings people. The system converts them.

outcomes.title: Activate all 8 monetization models
outcomes.body: From UGC with no follower minimum to long-term ambassadorships, licensing, and multi-platform monetization—with realistic estimated income for LATAM and the USA in each model.

outcomes.title: Charge what your work is worth
outcomes.body: Pricing guide by level and collaboration type, the extras you should always charge separately (usage rights, exclusivity, rush fees), and ready-made scripts for when they say “that’s too expensive” or only offer product trade.

outcomes.title: Turn your profile into a commercial asset
outcomes.body: Bio that attracts brands in 10 seconds, Signature Series with recurring sponsorship potential, professional media kit, and metrics that tell you what’s working—and what action to take with that data.

solution.imageAlt: Isabella — method applied to real content

proof.headline: I lived it first. When it worked, I turned it into the system I wish someone had given me earlier.
proof.intro: There was a moment when I had content, I had an audience, and I had no income. Not because I wasn’t working—because I had no system. I didn’t know what to charge, I had no strategy to land brands, I didn’t understand which metrics mattered. This ebook is everything I learned after: the bridge between visibility and real money, distilled into eight chapters with exercises to execute as you go.

bullets: Posting without a clear attraction or conversion system
First collaborations without knowing how to negotiate or what to charge
Hard to communicate my commercial offer to brands
Early versions of the 3-stage conversion system
More clarity on pricing, usage rights, and negotiation
Still no consolidated inbound strategy or Signature Series
Professional media kit, optimized bio, and strategic highlights
Model diversification: brand deals + UGC + ambassadorships
The right metrics for decisions—not just for reporting
More than 100 collaborations with aligned brands
Active conversion system and diversified income
The full map in this ebook so you can follow it with more clarity than I had

hero.statement: It’s not just an ebook. It’s the system that closes the gap between creating content and living from it: conversion, pricing, negotiation, commercial profile, and metrics—all in one journey with exercises to execute as you go.

bonuses.painHeadline: You post without a system and run out of ideas
bonuses.outcomeBenefit: Your Notion system: ideas bank, calendar, and content tracking—you stop winging it every week with the same base I use.

bonuses.painHeadline: You check metrics but don’t know what to do next
bonuses.outcomeBenefit: Tracker with retention, saves, shares, and conversations—with space dedicated to concrete decisions. Because data only helps if you know what action to take with it.

bonuses.painHeadline: A brand reaches out and you don’t know how to reply or what to charge
bonuses.outcomeBenefit: Pro-level script: how to reply to a proposal, raise your rates with confidence, and say no without burning the relationship—in DM, email, and on a call.

bonuses.painHeadline: You freeze on camera or lose the thread while recording
bonuses.outcomeBenefit: Safe-zone template to structure hook, core message, and CTA before you hit record—film with more clarity, more confidence, and more brand coherence.

urgency.title: Every week you post without a conversion system is visibility that doesn’t turn into income.
bullets: No fake caps or countdown timers. The real cost is keeping posting without knowing how to charge, without a strategy to land brands, without the right metrics—while other creators are building it.
Launch bonuses are available in this opening window. When the period closes, the price goes up and the bonuses are removed from the package.

faq.introBody: Before something holds you back, here are the most common questions.

items.q: Do I need to have read Vol. 1 and 2 to get the most from this ebook?
items.a: The ebook assumes you already have a defined identity and a basic content system—what you built in the first two volumes. If you’ve read them, you can apply everything right away. If you haven’t but you’ve been creating for a while with niche and voice clarity, it will still help. If you’re starting from zero, I recommend starting with Vol. 1—monetizing without solid foundations is building on sand.

items.q: Does this work if I have few followers?
items.a: Yes, and there’s a full chapter on it. The UGC model—where you create content for brands to use on their own channels—doesn’t require any follower minimum. Creators have earned in their first month without posting anything on their personal account. Followers matter more for brand deals and ambassadorships, and you also get the engagement vs. absolute number guide for that.

items.q: What types of collaborations is the system for?
items.a: All of them. The ebook covers 8 distinct models: UGC, brand deals, long-term ambassadorships, content licensing, sponsored events, platform programs, campaign appearances, and multi-platform monetization. Depending on your stage, some are more accessible today. The ebook helps you identify which are right for you now—and which to activate in the next 6 months.

items.q: Does it include real prices or only general guidance?
items.a: Real prices. The pricing chapter includes tables for LATAM and the USA by level (beginner, intermediate, advanced) and collaboration type: UGC per video, sponsored Reels, stories, monthly ambassadorships, and licensing. It also covers extras you should always charge separately—usage rights, exclusivity, rush fees, and additional versions—with reference amounts for each market.

items.q: What format is the ebook in?
items.a: It’s a PDF designed to read and work through. It has 8 chapters with practical exercises at the end of each—so you don’t just read, you build your system as you go. Each chapter ends with concrete actions to execute that same week.

Refund policy applies per the payment platform—you can review it before buying at checkout. What I can promise is that the content is the same system I built for myself: not theory, but the real map I used to go from not knowing what to charge to more than 100 brand collaborations.

close.headline: You are the Main Character. And leading ladies don’t wait for someone to yell “action”—they give it to themselves.
close.body: You have the conversion system. You have the 8 models. You have pricing, scripts, and metrics. Now there’s only one variable: you—choosing to leave spectator mode and step into lead role. The life you want to build as a creator isn’t waiting somewhere far off. It’s built with what you do today.
close.footnote: The only requirement to live from what you create is deciding that’s exactly what you’re going to do.

transitions.problemToSolution: What if the conversion system already exists — you just need to apply it?
transitions.proofToOffer: That is the system. Already proven. Available right now.

exitIntent.headline: Before you go...
exitIntent.body: The difference between visibility and real income is a system. This ebook is that system.
